THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RASSAK, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT TILE FINANCIAL, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
